title: Peter Rabbit Children's Kids 3pcs Cutlery Set - Knife/Fork/Spoon
features: MEALS ARE FUN WITH FAVOURITE CHARACTERS: This 3 piece metal cutlery set has kid's favourite cartoon characters printed on it which makes meals fascinating and fun. Cute cartoon prints can encourage your little ones more to eat on their own.
100% SAFE : This dinnerware set is certified food safe (US/EU) and 100% BPA, harmful toxins and chemicals free.
SIZE MADE FOR KIDS : Smaller than normal adult sized knife, fork and spoon set it is ideal for little hands of kids.
VIBRANT DESIGN: Each item has a metal top and plastic coated handle with your favourite character print and branding.
GREAT GIFT IDEA: This cutlery set features a fun print, making it a great gift idea for any occasion for kids. They are all dishwasher-safe for easy clean.
description: Peter Rabbit Children's Kids 3pcs Cutlery Set, Knife/Fork/Spoon. Each Cutlery has a length of 15.5cm and widest width of 2cm.
